description: An employee has referred a candidate for an open position through the referral portal.

nodes.task_description: Receive the referral notification from the ATS.

expected_outcome.expected: Recruiter sees a new referral in their queue.

nodes.task_description: Review the referred candidate's resume and ensure they are linked to the referring employee in the system.

expected_outcome.expected: Recruiter reviews the resume and confirms the referral source is correctly tagged.

nodes.task_description: If the candidate is hired, ensure the referring employee receives their referral bonus.

expected_outcome.expected: After the referred candidate is hired, the recruiter triggers the bonus payment for the referring employee.
